authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(86) — Mammoth Pool (Fresno and Madera Cos.)
sources.quotedText: Mammoth Pool (Fresno and Madera Cos.). All year. 5 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)

USGS GNIS feature ID 266964 ("Mammoth Pool Reservoir") and coordinate, per Wikidata Q6745870 — GNIS gaz_id 266964 is not indexed in the carto.nationalmap.gov ArcGIS geonames MapServer mirror (layers 6 and 7 both return zero features for gaz_name/gaz_id/name-LIKE/spatial-envelope queries covering this location), so this Wikidata/Wikipedia-sourced GNIS reference is used as the fallback per the audit's GNIS-first-then-Wikipedia-infobox convention
sources.quotedText: {"mainsnak":{"property":"P625","datavalue":{"value":{"latitude":37.3541,"longitude":-119.309}}}}; {"mainsnak":{"property":"P590","datavalue":{"value":"266964"}}} — coordinate and GNIS ID exactly match the file's recorded lon/lat (-119.3090, 37.3541); also matches the {{coord|37.3541|-119.309}} and {{gnis|266964}} infobox values in Wikipedia's Mammoth_Pool_Reservoir article wikitext, coordinate confirmed.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R4 Fresno Mammoth Pool Lake Brown Trout Sub-catchable Put and Grow October-December; R4 Fresno Mammoth Pool Lake Eagle Lake Trout Sub-catchable Put and Grow October-December

regulations.verbatimText: Mammoth Pool (Fresno and Madera Cos.). All year.

parameters.counting_rule: 5 trout daily bag limit; this special regulation entry does not specify a distinct possession limit. General statewide bag/possession limits for other species such as kokanee salmon apply separately.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Mammoth Pool Lake (Region 4, Fresno Co.) for sub-catchable-size Brown Trout under the Put and Grow program, with a stated release month range of October-December. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Mammoth Pool Lake (Region 4, Fresno Co.) for sub-catchable-size Eagle Lake Trout under the Put and Grow program, with a stated release month range of October-December. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.
